heading: Tax treatment of Conrail public sale
label: 1347 Tax treatment of Conrail public sale

CodificationThis section was enacted as part of the Omnibus Budget Reconciliation Act of 1986, and not as part of subtitle A of title IV of that Act, known as the Conrail Privatization Act, which comprises this chapter.

Amendments1986—Subsecs. (a)(1), (2), (d). substituted “Internal Revenue Code of 1986” for “Internal Revenue Code of 1954”, which for purposes of codification was translated as “title 26” thus requiring no change in text.Pub. L. 99–514

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: For periods after the public sale, for purposes of title 26, Conrail shall be treated as a new corporation which purchased all of its assets as of the beginning of the day after the date of the public sale for an amount equal to the deemed purchase price.

children.heading: Allocation among assets
children.label: 2 Allocation among assets
children.text: The deemed purchase price shall be allocated among the assets of Conrail in accordance with the temporary regulations prescribed under (as such regulations were in effect on ). The Secretary shall establish specific guidelines for carrying out the preceding sentence so that the basis of each asset will be clearly ascertainable. For purposes of applying the regulations referred to in the first sentence, accounts receivable and materials and supplies shall be treated as cash equivalents.section 338 of title 26October 21, 1986

children.label: A
children.text: the numerator of which is 100 percent, and

children.label: B
children.text: the denominator of which is the percentage (by value) of the stock of Conrail sold in the public sale.

children.heading: No income from cancellation of debt or preferred stock
children.label: b No income from cancellation of debt or preferred stock
children.text: No amount shall be included in the gross income of any person by reason of any cancellation of any obligation (or preferred stock) of Conrail in connection with the public sale.

children.heading: Disallowance of certain deductions
children.label: c Disallowance of certain deductions
children.text: No deduction shall be allowed to Conrail for any amount which is paid after the date of the public sale to employees of Conrail for services performed on or before the date of the public sale.

children.heading: Waiver of certain employee stock ownership plan provisions
children.label: d Waiver of certain employee stock ownership plan provisions

children.text: the limits of section 415 of such title (relating to limitations on benefits and contributions under qualified plans) shall not apply with respect to interests in stock transferred pursuant to this Act or a law heretofore enacted, and
the 2-year waiting period for withdrawals shall not apply to withdrawals of amounts (or shares) in participants accounts in connection with the public sale.

children.heading: Conrail
children.label: 1 Conrail
children.text: The term “Conrail” means the Consolidated Rail Corporation. Such term includes any corporation which was a subsidiary of Conrail immediately before the public sale.

children.heading: Public sale
children.label: 2 Public sale
children.text: The term “public sale” means the sale of stock in Conrail pursuant to a public offering under the Conrail Privatization Act [ et seq.]. If there is more than 1 public offering under such Act, such term means the sale pursuant to the initial public offering under such Act.45 U.S.C. 1301

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Treasury or his delegate.
